job_summary: WHSmith North America is a leading global travel retailer with over 1,700 stores across 30 countries. They are seeking a detail-oriented SQL Reporting Analyst responsible for designing, executing, and optimizing SQL queries to support data analysis initiatives and enable data-driven decision making.
